root.name: slide_2_paragraph_to_bullets
root.description: Evaluates if slide 2's paragraph was split into two bullet points as specified, and the second bullet was indented.

children.name: slide_2_content_changed
children.description: Checks if slide 2's content was modified.

children.name: slide_2_bullets_present
children.description: Verifies two correct bullet points now exist on slide 2.

children.name: slide_2_second_bullet_indented
children.description: Checks if the second bullet is indented relative to the first bullet.

children.name: slide_2_no_extraneous_changes
children.description: Checks for absence of unintended changes on slide 2 (e.g., unrelated text/formatting changes).

metadata.task: On slide 2, break the paragraph into two bullet points:  'Obesity is defined as excess body fat' and 'Because body fat is difficult to measure directly, obesity is often measured by body mass index (BMI)', and indent the second bullet point
